aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Admin users with full access to organization configuration

databaseInput.description: Penguin Health analytics — charts (CSV) and validation_results (Parquet), per org.
databaseInput.name: penguin_health_analytics

tableInput.description: Per-chart CSV files for circles-of-care written by the CSV splitter. One file per chart; many rows per file.
tableInput.name: charts_circles_of_care

tableInput.description: End-of-run Parquet snapshot of validation results for circles-of-care. One row per rule per document. Mutable feedback fields are intentionally NOT included.
tableInput.name: validation_results_circles_of_care

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Analytics queries over circles-of-care's charts and validation_results. Query results land in this org's bucket only — never commingled with other orgs' data.
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: penguin-health-analytics-circles-of-care

tableInput.description: Per-chart CSV files for catholic-charities-multi-org written by the CSV splitter. One file per chart; many rows per file.
tableInput.name: charts_catholic_charities_multi_org

tableInput.description: End-of-run Parquet snapshot of validation results for catholic-charities-multi-org. One row per rule per document. Mutable feedback fields are intentionally NOT included.
tableInput.name: validation_results_catholic_charities_multi_org

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Analytics queries over catholic-charities-multi-org's charts and validation_results. Query results land in this org's bucket only — never commingled with other orgs' data.
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: penguin-health-analytics-catholic-charities-multi-org

tableInput.description: Per-chart CSV files for demo written by the CSV splitter. One file per chart; many rows per file.
tableInput.name: charts_demo

tableInput.description: End-of-run Parquet snapshot of validation results for demo. One row per rule per document. Mutable feedback fields are intentionally NOT included.
tableInput.name: validation_results_demo

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Analytics queries over demo's charts and validation_results. Query results land in this org's bucket only — never commingled with other orgs' data.
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: penguin-health-analytics-demo
